description:
#YogadayYogaAnthem #VishalSrivastav #India
 #YOGA #ANTHEM" sung by ME & Atima Nayyar. 

This is just a small contribution by my team to inspire everyone for doing #YOGA on #YOGA #DAY to keep ourselves Healthy and Fit.

Special Thanks to, 
Music Director - Vinay Kapoor  Lyrics - Ziyol Khan
Concept by - Faqruddin
